primary_composite.source: AACT NCT04435626 outcome_id=211389563 analysis_id=105586807 (rate ratio 0.84, 95% CI 0.74-0.95, p=0.0072; stratified Andersen-Gill model); PMID:39225278 (Solomon NEJM 2024); note: rate ratio, not Cox HR — log-HR interpretation approximate

acm.source: AACT NCT04435626 outcome_id=211389570 analysis_id=105586812 (cause-specific HR 0.93, 95% CI 0.83-1.06, p=0.2794; stratified log-rank; Full Analysis Set); PMID:39225278 (Solomon NEJM 2024)

cv_death.source: Derived (assumption: CV death HR 0.91 from Lancet IPD MRA meta-analysis PMID:39232490; CI approximated using HF hosp SE as proxy; baseline_prop 0.60 = typical CV fraction of ACM in HFpEF; AACT NCT04435626 does not separately report CV death; placeholder for clinician review)

non_cv_death.source: Derived from conservation law: non_cv HR = (ACM_HR - 0.60 x CV_death_HR) / 0.40 = 0.96; CI approximate; AACT NCT04435626 does not separately report non-CV death; placeholder for clinician review

hf_hosp.source: AACT NCT04435626 outcome_id=211389565 analysis_id=105586808 (rate ratio 0.82, 95% CI 0.71-0.94, p=0.0062; stratified Andersen-Gill model; total recurrent HF events); PMID:39225278 (Solomon NEJM 2024); note: rate ratio, not Cox HR

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: finerenone delta-K ~+0.18 mmol/L in HFpEF population; based on FIDELIO/FIGARO DKD data and smaller HFpEF-range eGFR effect; AACT NCT04435626 baseline_measurements does not report serum potassium change; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: modest SBP reduction ~1 mmHg; placeholder for clinician review; AACT NCT04435626 baseline_measurements does not report continuous SBP change)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: small acute eGFR dip typical of MRA class; AACT NCT04435626 baseline_measurements does not report continuous eGFR change; placeholder for clinician review)
